global.description: The ad features a modern design with geometric shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting financial clarity and peace of mind.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and calming base.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large light blue rectangle and an oval shape are centered, creating a modern and abstract visual.

elements.label: Additional geometric shapes
elements.description: A smaller light blue square and two circles are arranged within the main subject area, adding depth and interest.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small light blue circle positioned towards the bottom center, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: Another small circle
elements.description: Another small light blue circle, similar to the previous one, positioned slightly to the left.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Your money, clearer' with a smaller tagline below in a clean font.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Shop now' in a bold font, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo labeled 'EarnPath' in white, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with geometric shapes, financial clarity.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned with the main subject, while the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your money, clearer, Built for peace of mind, Shop now, EarnPath, UGC
